steps.t: Reeve Fríthild is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should bring Captain Grimmar's recommendation to Reeve Fríthild.
Reeve Fríthild is at her encampment to the south of Stoke, just off the road on the other side of the bridge on the road to Kingstead. Reeve Fríthild …
Reeve Fríthild is at her encampment to the south of Stoke. You should speak with Reeve Fríthild regarding the battle.
The Reeve of Stoke is in the Mead Hall. The Reeve instructed you to meet in Stoke to plan for the next attack.
